reviews.comment: Booked an iPhone 12 screen repair and it was done in under an hour. Screen looks perfect and touch works like new.
reviews.provider_response: Thanks for the feedback! We’re glad your iPhone 12 is back to normal.

reviews.comment: Good price for an iPhone 12 screen replacement and they finished the same afternoon. Only slight delay on my appointment time.
reviews.provider_response: We appreciate your patience and will work on shortening wait times.

reviews.comment: Walked in for a cracked smartphone screen. Repair was solid and reasonably quick, but the waiting area was a bit crowded.
reviews.provider_response: Thanks for the review! We’re upgrading our waiting area soon.

reviews.comment: Had the battery replaced on my HP laptop. It holds charge better now, though the job took a little longer than quoted.
reviews.provider_response: Apologies for the delay and thank you for your patience.

reviews.comment: Great experience replacing the battery on my HP Pavilion 15. Clear pricing and they explained the tests they ran.
reviews.provider_response: Glad to hear your Pavilion is running longer on battery now.

reviews.comment: They fixed the HDMI port on my PS5 after another shop said it was not repairable. Console works flawlessly now.
reviews.provider_response: We’re happy we could bring your PS5 back to life!

reviews.comment: HDMI port repair on my PS5 was successful and the price was fair. Took an extra day due to parts, but they kept me updated.
reviews.provider_response: Thanks for the review and for bearing with the parts delay.

reviews.comment: Tech came out the same week and fixed our washer that wouldn’t drain. No diagnostic fee and the quote matched the final bill.
reviews.provider_response: We appreciate the feedback and are glad your washer is working again.

reviews.comment: Washer was making a loud grinding noise. They scheduled a Saturday evening visit and fixed it in one trip.
reviews.provider_response: Thanks for choosing us for your weekend repair.

reviews.comment: Needed an emergency phone repair late at night. They arrived quickly and had the phone usable again in under an hour.
reviews.provider_response: Happy we could help in a pinch!

reviews.comment: Used their free pickup service for a Samsung tablet charging issue. Port was replaced and delivered back the next day.
reviews.provider_response: Thank you for the review and for trying our pickup service.

reviews.comment: Great communication and the free courier pickup for my tablet made it really convenient. Charging port works perfectly now.
reviews.provider_response: We’re glad the repair and courier service worked well for you.

reviews.comment: My laptop would not boot and they recovered all important documents. Free diagnostic and I only paid after confirming the files.
reviews.provider_response: Thank you for trusting us with your data.

reviews.comment: They recovered most of the files from a failing laptop drive and clearly explained the no-fix-no-fee policy upfront.
reviews.provider_response: We appreciate your review and are glad we could help.
